title: Haunted Child
content:
In the dark of wedlock
            nightly sky,
        the wither of hope
            and estranged replies,
        cause a white face to flicker
            with transparent eye,
        calumny of purpose
            to slowly die.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Haunted Child", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
